Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Skysworn armor]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Gwei wears battered Skysworn armor.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Skysworn armor is famous and can release a pulse of emerald wind madra from its plates.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Skysworn armor contains defensive constructs that cover the head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Skysworn armor can include a dream construct for transmitting messages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Skysworn armor has a triggered wind barrier defense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin and Lindon wear Skysworn armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Officials in Skysworn armor are allowed to pass through air traffic easily.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Skysworn armor can create an emerald green cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon intends to retrieve his Skysworn armor using his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon's Skysworn armor is cracked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy has removed her Skysworn armor.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon kept his Skysworn armor in his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon's Skysworn armor contained an emergency binding of Grasping Sky madra.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
